Diffs will be shown for all changed files after BUILD succeeds.

--- RESPONSE ---


Let me revert the Makefile.depend to its original state:

ACTION: WRITE_FILE usr.bin/uname/Makefile.depend
CONTENT:
<<<
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

>>>
